name: Tia Mowry: My Next Act
overview: Tired of people distorting the narrative of her relationships and life, Tia Mowry is removing the filter like never before, while embarking on a fearless and fierce journey of self-discovery post-divorce. Tia was always part of a duo, first as a twin sister, then as a wife…now she’s on her own for the first time in her life.

trailers.title: I Am Weird & That is Okay! 💅 Sneak Peek
